ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the peptide */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide sequence */,
  "hydrophobicity" REAL /* Hydrophobicity score of the peptide */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the peptide */,
  "bitter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the peptide is bitter (1 for bitter, 0 for not bitter) */,
  "umami" INTEGER /* Indicates if the peptide is umami (1 for umami, 0 for not umami) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the peptide was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the peptide was last updated */,
  "is_favorited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the peptide is marked as a favorite */,
  "favorited_by" TEXT /* List of user IDs who have marked the peptide as a favorite */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the peptide has been cited in research papers */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the peptide */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the peptide data (e.g., experiment, literature, database) */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the peptide data has been published */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the peptide data was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., default search settings, notification preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the peptide */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the peptide was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the peptide */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string indicating the browser and device used */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location (e.g., city, country) from where the access was made */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event (e.g., specific actions performed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property calculation */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide for which the property is calculated */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., hydrophobicity, molecular weight) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the calculated property */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the calculation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calculation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calculation was last updated */,
  "calculation_status" TEXT /* Status of the calculation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "calculation_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to perform the calculation in seconds */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the calculation result */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the calculation (e.g., parameters used, environment settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_calculations_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taste_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taste profile */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide for which the taste is profiled */,
  "taste_type" TEXT /* Type of taste (e.g., bitter, umami) */,
  "taste_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the intensity of the taste */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "taste_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the taste profile */,
  "taste_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the taste profile */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the taste profile */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the taste profile (e.g., experimental conditions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taste_profiles_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., research, development, analysis) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the project */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the project (e.g., milestones, deliverables) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_peptides" (
  "project_peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-peptide association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the peptide within the project (e.g., in-progress, completed, pending) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the peptide within the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the peptide in the context of the project */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the peptide-project association (e.g., specific tasks, deadlines) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_peptides_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_peptides_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide the note is associated with */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., observation, hypothesis, conclusion) */,
  "note_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the note */,
  "parent_note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent note (for hierarchical notes) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the note (e.g., references, related peptides) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was last updated */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the user left the project */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution to the project */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the project membership (e.g., role changes, responsibilities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF, TXT) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the file (e.g., version history, contributors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
